author: y4rr
content:
Closed APPROVE. Full-scope FusedChain PTX runtime executor wired end-to-end on RTX 3090.

Implementation:
- ferrotorch-jit/Cargo.toml — ferrotorch-gpu added as optional dep under cuda feature; feature comment expanded to document the runtime executor scope.
- ferrotorch-jit/src/nvrtc.rs (new, ~100 LoC) — NVRTC C→PTX compile helper factored out of codegen_gpu.rs (-72 LoC) and reused for f64 fusion. Quality improvement beyond pre-flight ask.
- ferrotorch-jit/src/fusion.rs — FusedChain extended with generate_cuda_source_f64_named for f64 NVRTC-libdevice path; apply_fused transparently dispatches on is_cuda() with cfg-gated GPU route.
- ferrotorch-jit/src/fusion_gpu.rs (new, 578 LoC, #[cfg(feature='cuda')]) — apply_fused_gpu<T> TypeId-dispatches on f32/f64; loads PTX via ferrotorch-gpu module cache; launches kernel via cudarc LaunchBuilder; wraps output as device-resident Tensor.
- ferrotorch-gpu/src/module_cache.rs — get_or_compile_owned(ctx, String, String, device_ordinal) with DefaultHasher content-addressable cache key (+262 LoC).
- Doc updates: zero #1138 placeholders remain in source; module + apply_fused docs describe the new dual-dtype GPU path.

Verification (RTX 3090 hardware):
- 9 GPU-runtime tests passed: apply_fused_gpu_f32/f64_roundtrip, with/without_transcendentals, preserves_device, errs_on_binary_op f32/f64, multi_op_chain matches CPU, cache_hit_second_call.
- 2 module-cache tests passed: get_or_compile_owned_returns_same_function_on_repeated_calls, get_or_compile_owned_different_ptx_returns_different_function.
- cargo test -p ferrotorch-jit --lib --features cuda: 320 passed (+9 vs baseline 311).
- Build + clippy -D warnings clean with cuda feature.

Zero follow-ups filed per user directive 'no deferrals, no half efforts'. First clean APPROVE of Pass 5 series.
